name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-content-extraction
description: MyndHyve market-intel.content-extraction — extract structured content from raw HTML via one ctx.callAI. Outputs title, cleaned content, author, publishedAt, contentType, engagement metrics, tags, summary, and relevantQuotes. Sits between host.webResearch.fetchBatch and market-intel.voc-extraction in the canonical pipeline. Fifth marketIntel pack of the Stage 5 cohort.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Extract Content from HTML
nodes.description: Single AI call. Inputs: rawHtml (required, truncated to 50000 chars by default), url (required), optional contentTypeHint. Outputs: title, cleaned content, author, publishedAt (ISO-validated), contentType (one of 7 enum values), engagement (upvotes/comments/views/shares nullable ints), tags, summary, relevantQuotes (≥5 chars each). Soft validation: invalid fields default with warnings; HTML truncation reported as wasTruncated flag.
